name: Inanna/Ishtar
subtitle: Full Correspondences
flowText: Inanna/Ishtar embodies love and war paradox — under Venus · Mars; in Aries, Libra.

related.name: ♇ Pluto
related.teaser: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows.

related.name: ♀ Venus
related.teaser: Venus is the rose of harmony — magnetic union, pulse of beauty, lover’s path.

related.name: ♂ Mars
related.teaser: Mars is the blade of fire — spear of will, tower’s flame, the storm of courage.

related.name: Zephyrus
related.teaser: Heart is the vesica of the world — the overlap where differences become devotion.

related.name: Hachiman
related.teaser: Hachiman embodies honor, law, single combat — under Mars; in Aries.

related.name: Tyr
related.teaser: Tyr embodies honor, law, single combat — under Mars; in Aries.

related.name: ♃ Jupiter
related.teaser: Jupiter is the thunder scepter — wheel of fate, king of sky, expansion of spirit.

related.name: Odin
related.teaser: Odin embodies sky, thunder, sovereignty — under Jupiter; in Leo, Sagittarius.

related.name: Bragi
related.teaser: Bragi embodies sun, clarity, arts, prophecy — under Sun; in Leo.

related.name: Arawn
related.teaser: Arawn embodies sun, clarity, arts, prophecy — under Sun; in Leo.

related.name: Amaterasu
related.teaser: Amaterasu embodies sun, clarity, arts, prophecy — under Sun; in Leo.

related.name: ♄ Saturn
related.teaser: Saturn is the black mountain — the ring of time, stern father, weight of law.
